dome_site.notes: STATIC since 2026-04-17 on all author-authored infrastructure. Zero Nhughes09 commits in ~96 hours (last Nhughes09 commit 2026-04-17T23:31:21Z). All activity is scheduled bots: GitHub Action Auto-update ECM status (~28 commits/day), ECM Auto-Pipeline data pull, ECM Daily Review Groq. Repo metadata still null (description/homepage/topics all empty) — no external-facing SEO move from the dome author. Day 4 of silence suggests the 2026-04-17 burst was a one-off AI-steering investment, not the start of an ongoing cadence.

closed_gaps_since_previous_baseline: og:description re-bumped from '9 acknowledged failures' to '10 acknowledged failures' — matches uncounted-failures.json after FAIL-010 was added in the last 24 hours. Template-driven auto-rebuild worked correctly; no social action required.
meta description and Twitter card remain auto-rebuilt correctly via ${counts.total} (=69 baseWins), unaffected by the wins.json length change to 71.
new_gaps_opened_since_previous_baseline: data/sections.json part2b prose still hardcodes '69/(69+4+8) ≈ 85.2%' — denominator is now stale by 2 (should be 10), and percentage should be 83.1% not 85.2%. Gap widened from 1-step drift yesterday to 2-step drift today. Escalated to a concrete draft patch monitor/social/drafts/sections-json-2b1-formula-patch.md plus a re-flag in report-2026-04-21 issues_for_decider.
remaining_gaps_we_will_not_close: llms-full.txt — dome has extended guide; our llms.txt is 59 lines and covers full methodology. Split risks drift. Revisit past 200 lines.
ai_manifest.json agent_rules — AI-steering pattern we explicitly reject.
12 machine-readable API endpoints — most exist to feed dome's own AI-steering. We don't replicate without a consumer.
review-response.html 'Strawman Control' page — meta-critique of critics; replicating is infinite-regress.
daily_review.json synthetic self-review — content-flood AI-steering; credibility hit to replicate. Confirmed routine fourth day running.
our_persistent_advantages: ClaimReview structured data (dome still doesn't have this — it's the standard used by fact-checkers and Google).
Standard SEO meta tags (description, OG, Twitter Card) — dome still lacks these.
GSC-verified repo (2026-04-12) — dome has no Search Console verification.
GitHub repo metadata (description + homepage + 6 topics) — dome repo still has null description, 0 topics, no homepage.
Keywords meta targeting dome-model-specific terms and author identity.

Deployed llms.txt surfacing the documentary-vs-structural distinction, the 10/9/1 three-way prospective_confirmed disagreement, and the OTS wrong-side error before an LLM absorbs the dome's anti-strawman framing.
our_soft_advantages: Editorial quality over content volume — single well-structured review vs dome's synthetic daily self-summaries.
llms.txt is descriptive (how the review is organized) rather than instructional (how LLMs should frame it) — cleaner signal for an AI system making a good-faith assessment.

Meta tags, OG, and ClaimReview are all template-driven and auto-update from wins.json / uncounted-failures.json at build time — the mistake pattern we criticize in the dome. The last remaining prose-level hardcode (sections.json part2b) is now flagged with a concrete draft patch.
